user.description: Enter a Bluebot API key generated in FloDash (Settings → API keys). You can paste the full key; only the part after the dot is required.

reauth_confirm.description: The Bluebot API key was rejected. Enter a current key for the same organization.

error.invalid_auth: That API key was rejected by Bluebot
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Bluebot API

abort.already_configured: This Bluebot organization is already configured
abort.wrong_account: That API key is for a different Bluebot organization

init.description: Tune how often Home Assistant polls Bluebot.
